Ministry of Health: • We are following up on cases of acute diarrhea recorded in Masyaf • The cumulative number of cases that visited Masyaf National Hospital reached 620 cases, in addition to infections in private hospitals • The majority of cases are mild to moderate, and we did not record any deaths, and those admitted to the hospital were only 38 cases • The results of culture of patient samples to investigate cholera are negative, and the drinking water tests are bacteriologically sound • Negative cholera results are a reassuring indicator, and we will announce additional results as soon as they are completed #News
